hero.subtitle: Next-Gen 3D AI Avatar System
hero.desc1: Forget boring text boxes. Talk face-to-face with a 3D VRoid avatar that
hero.desc1_2: sees you, hears you, understands you
hero.desc1_3: — and responds with real emotions, real voice, and real-time intelligence.
hero.desc2: This is what AI interaction was always meant to be.
hero.authHint: Sign in required to access the free demo

why.title3: When You Can Talk to a
why.desc: ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini — they are all just text in a box. No face, no voice, no emotion. Quantum VRM changes everything.
why.adv1Desc: Users spend 10x longer in conversation vs. text-only AI chats
why.adv2Desc: A full VRoid body with animations, not an avatar circle with initials
why.adv3Desc: Speak and get a voiced reply in real-time, with matching expressions
why.adv4Desc: This is not an upgrade to chatbots. It is an entirely new way to interact with AI.

feature.desc: Every feature is engineered for an immersive, emotionally intelligent experience that blurs the line between digital and real.
feature.feat1Desc: Dynamic personality system with memory core. Your avatar remembers past conversations and adapts responses with emotional intelligence.
feature.feat2Desc: Natural voice conversation with instant response. Speak naturally and get emotionally-charged, real replies in real time.
feature.feat3Desc: Share your screen and let the AI analyze what you are working on. Get contextual help, suggestions, and real-time feedback.
feature.feat4Desc: Dynamic expressions with variable duration. From micro-expressions to lingering moods, the avatar feels genuinely alive.
feature.feat5Desc: Built-in behavioral analysis and safety reporting. Detects threats, captures evidence, and enables fast moderation.
feature.feat6Desc: Smart caching via IndexedDB, aggressive garbage collection, and code splitting. Smooth experience even on mid-range hardware.
feature.img2Desc: Your AI sees what you see

demo.desc: Talk face-to-face, explore real emotions, and see why 3D AI avatars make text-based chatbots feel prehistoric. No credit card required.
demo.authHint: Sign in required to access the free demo
demo.loggedIn: You are signed in. Launch the demo below!

pricing.desc: Start free and upgrade when you need more. No hidden fees, cancel anytime.
pricing.proFeat5: Camera access for AI vision (limited time)
pricing.plusFeat1: Unlimited voice chat - no daily limit
pricing.plusFeat3: Memory across sessions - AI remembers you
pricing.note1: All plans include access to the base VRoid 3D AI avatar.
pricing.note2_1: unlocks screen analysis and extended voice chat.
pricing.note2_2: unlocks custom personas, memory, own model uploads, and removes all limits.

whyMock.botMsg1: Hello! I am an AI assistant. How can I help you today?
whyMock.botMsg2: Sure! Here is a wall of text with no expression, no feeling, just... words on a screen.

whyOldWay.item1: Staring at a white screen with walls of text
whyOldWay.item2: No face, no body language, no emotion — just words
whyOldWay.item3: Copy-paste responses that feel robotic and lifeless
whyOldWay.item4: Zero personality — every AI feels exactly the same
whyOldWay.item5: Type and wait... type and wait... type and wait
whyOldWay.item6: No voice, no real-time interaction, no presence
whyOldWay.item7: Feels like talking to a search engine, not a being

whyNewWay.item1: A real 3D VRoid avatar that looks at you and reacts
whyNewWay.item2: Dynamic facial expressions — smiles, surprise, anger, thinking
whyNewWay.item3: Real-time voice conversation — just talk naturally
whyNewWay.item4: Unique personality engine with emotional intelligence
whyNewWay.item5: Instant responses with facial reactions and body language
whyNewWay.item6: Screen sharing — your AI can SEE what you are working on
whyNewWay.item7: Feels like talking to a real companion, not a tool

auth.descLogin: Sign in to access the demo
auth.descReg: Register to try the free demo
auth.errNoAccount: No account found with this email. Please register first.
auth.succLogin: Signed in successfully! You can now access the demo.

auth.succReg: Account created! You can now access the demo.
